headline: Marriott (MAR) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: First quarter global RevPAR rose 4.2%.  RevPAR in the U.S. and Canada region rose 4%.  While luxury RevPAR rose nearly 7%, select service RevPAR increased 3.5%, a meaningful improvement from the fourth quarter when select service was down more than 1% year-over-year.

raw.headline: Marriott (MAR) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript

headline: Marriott’s (NASDAQ:MAR) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Global hospitality company Marriott (NASDAQ:MAR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $6.65 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.72 per share was 6.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
